PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/v1/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@test.com","password":"test"}' -ErrorAction Stop; $r.StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ })

PowerShell($ready = $false; for \($i = 0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $conn = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $conn.Connect\("127.0.0.1", 3001\); $conn.Close\(\); $ready = $true; break } catch {} }; if \($ready\) { Write-Host "Port 3001 open" } else { Write-Host "Timed out"; Get-Content C:\\Users\\vganc\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\nest-backend.log -Tail 10 })

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c npm run start:dev" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\vganc\\Documents\\Claude\\Projects\\totalmvp\\backend" -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Users\\vganc\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\nest3.log" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Users\\vganc\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\nest3-err.log" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Host "PID: $\($p.Id\)")

PowerShell($ready = $false; for \($i = 0; $i -lt 35; $i++\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $log = \(Get-Content C:\\Users\\vganc\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\nest3.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Raw\) + \(Get-Content C:\\Users\\vganc\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\nest3-err.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Raw\); if \($log -match "successfully started"\) { $ready = $true; break } }; if \($ready\) { Write-Host "READY" } else { Write-Host "TIMEOUT"; $log | Select-String "ERROR|started|EADDR" | Select-Object -Last 5 })
